compareTo(Object) - Method in class com.example.listycity.City
Compares this city to another object by city name lexicographically.

Returns the number of cities currently in the list.

D

delete(City) - Method in class com.example.listycity.CityList
Removes a city from the list if it exists.

E

G

getCities() - Method in class com.example.listycity.CityList
Returns a sorted list of cities sorted by city name lexicographically.

Returns the name of the city (alias for getName)

Returns the name of the city

Returns the name of the province

H

hasCity(City) - Method in class com.example.listycity.CityList
Checks whether a given city exists in the list.

Returns a hash code based on city name and province name.

S

T

toMap() - Method in class com.example.listycity.City
